491.reason: [The condition incorrectly excludes valid characters like '\t' (tab, ASCII 9) and '\a' (bell, ASCII 7), which are valid escape sequences in string literals. The condition should allow all printable characters and common escape sequences, not just ASCII 32-126 excluding 34-39.]

485.reason: The lexer incorrectly treats valid escape sequences like \a and \t as errors. It only accepts \n, causing InvalidFormatString errors for other standard escapes, which leads to the program writing to error.txt instead of lexer.txt for valid source code.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The lexer incorrectly treats valid escape sequences like \a and \t as errors. It only accepts \n, causing InvalidFormatString errors for other standard escapes, which leads to the program writing to error.txt instead of lexer.txt for valid source code.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect escape sequence handling - only allows \n but should allow other valid escapes like \0, \t, \\, etc. for both strings and characters]

410.reason: The single quote character '\'' is not included in the 'symbols' map, causing an AssertionError when scanning character constants. Additionally, the lexer lacks logic to scan character constants (CHRCON), keywords 'char' (CHARTK), and 'getchar' (GETCHARTK).

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The single quote character '\'' is not included in the 'symbols' map, causing an AssertionError when scanning character constants. Additionally, the lexer lacks logic to scan character constants (CHRCON), keywords 'char' (CHARTK), and 'getchar' (GETCHARTK).
